---
title: "DataBankViewWidget"
---

## Overview

`dl::widget::DataBankViewWidget` displays captured memory-bank tensor metadata
in the deep learning view panel. It is embedded in `DeepLearningViewWidget`
below the model status header.

**Location:** `src/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/DataBank/`

## API

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `setAssembler()` | Connect to the session `SlotAssembler` for DataBank queries |
| `refresh()` | Rebuild preview cards for each encoded entry |

The constructor takes `std::shared_ptr<DeepLearningState>` for session context;
`setAssembler()` must be called before `refresh()` can resolve encoded tensors.

## Preview content

For each DataBank entry ID with an encoded tensor (`dataBank().ids()` filtered
by `getEncoded()`):

- Tensor shape and value range
- DataManager source key (from `DataBank` metadata or static input binding)
- Captured frame index
- Ready-for-inference status indicator

`DeepLearningPropertiesWidget::dataBankChanged` triggers
`DeepLearningViewWidget::refreshDataBankView()`, which delegates to
`DataBankViewWidget::refresh()`.
